# clang trunk: assertion "No-op copy with multiple parts!" in getCopyToParts during DAG lowering of tied inline asm operand on struct

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173680
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, backend:X86, crash, llvm:SelectionDAG, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-27T06:25:32Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/jTYdEKoY3

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Code
```c
#include <stdlib.h>
/* interopse with myftype_1 */
typedef struct {
  float *ptr;
  int *ptr2;
} myctype_t;

extern void abort(void);
void types_test(void);
/* declared in the fortran module */
extern myctype_t myVar;

int main(int argc, char **argv) {
  myctype_t *cptr;
  asm("" : "=r"(myVar) : "0"(&myVar));
  cptr->ptr = (float *)(size_t)(void *)1;
  cptr->ptr2 = (int *)(size_t)(void *)2;

  types_test();
}
```

## Code
```c
#include &lt;stdlib.h&gt;
/* interopse with myftype_1 */
typedef struct {
  float *ptr;
  int *ptr2;
} myctype_t;

extern void abort(void);
void types_test(void);
/* declared in the fortran module */
extern myctype_t myVar;

int main(int argc, char **argv) {
  myctype_t *cptr;
  asm("" : "=r"(myVar) : "0"(&amp;myVar));
  cptr-&gt;ptr = (float *)(size_t)(void *)1;
  cptr-&gt;ptr2 = (int *)(size_t)(void *)2;

  types_test();
}
```
</details>


---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Possible duplicate of https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/139383.

Both reduce to
```cpp
asm volatile("" : "=r"(a) : "0"(b));
```
where `sizeof(a) == 16` (and `sizeof(b)` seems to be irrelevant).

---
